title: Golden Skillet
description: This resource pack takes the beloved Golden Frying Pan from TF2 and puts it into Minecraft in the form of a Golden Skillet.
body:
This is a resource pack that replaces the texture for the Skillet from Farmer's delight, into a golden one, which is a homage to TF2's golden frying pan.
This resource pack was made in commemoration of the efforts surrounding #FixTF2 .
